meaning: adj.爆炸(性)的,爆发(性)的,暴露n.爆炸物,炸药
examples: He appeared to be treating the potentially explosive situation with some sensitivity.
A snowman is stuffed with explosive.
The explosive new style helped cut Killy's racing time dramatically.
During his life, Nobel was most famous for his experimentations with nitroglycerine, a highly explosive and unstable liquid.
On the social media front, Makino has experienced explosive growth in followers, engagement and social sharing.
